	 Name Notes 
	The characters of 烏桓 (wuhuan) are the same as those used for the Wuhuan tribe, thus ‘Chu of Wuhuan’ in many respected sources.

full_text:
Wuhuan Chu [Chu of Wuhuan] 烏桓觸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wuhuan Chu [Chu of Wuhuan] (烏桓觸). Tribal chief, swore fealty to Cao Cao rather then help the Yuan sons. Wuhuan Chu [Chu of Wuhuan] may not have existed in history. Wuhuan Chu [Chu of Wuhuan] was affiliated with Wuhuan and the Wei Kingdom.
